Haftungshinweis

title: Jan Hofmann
text: PhD student in the Chapman lab at Stony Brook University. In my research I focus on structural transformations in Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs).

title: Jan Hofmann
text:
Education
Stony Brook University | Stony Brook, NY
Ph.D. in Chemistry | 2021 – present

Focus on in situ characterization of metal-organic frameworks
Expected graduation: May 2027

Leipzig University | Leipzig, Germany
M.Sc. in Chemistry | 2018 – 2021

Thesis: Development of multicomponent alloys for fuel cell applications

Leipzig University | Leipzig, Germany
B.Sc. in Chemistry | 2014 – 2018

Thesis: Influences of neutral salt depleted mother liquor on the MFI-synthesis with respect to the hydrothermal stability of the zeolite
